name: presentation-studio
description: A revision-aware Kun PPT display HTML workspace for people and the main Kun Agent.

commands.title: Kun PPT: Create Deck
commands.description: Create a new root-level standalone HTML presentation.

commands.title: Kun PPT: Load Deck
commands.description: Load a root-level standalone HTML presentation.

commands.title: Kun PPT: Save Operations
commands.description: Save one revision-aware batch of visual presentation operations.

operationId.description: Optional idempotency key. Kun derives one from the tool invocation when omitted.

operations.description: Use only the declared operation kinds. element.upsert requires a complete typed element; element.style accepts bounded safe CSS declarations.

commands.title: Kun PPT: Export Copy
commands.description: Copy the current revision to another root-level HTML presentation.

tools.description: Create a new root-level standalone .kun-ppt.html presentation without overwriting an existing file.
Read the current structured presentation model and revision before planning edits.

Apply typed operations to the revision returned by presentation-read. operationId is optional. slide.insert defaults backgroundColor to null; element.upsert accepts complete elements; element.style accepts bounded safe CSS declarations for one element.

operationId.description: Optional idempotency key. Kun derives one from the tool invocation when omitted.

operations.description: Use only the declared operation kinds. element.upsert requires a complete typed element; element.style accepts bounded safe CSS declarations.

tools.description: Validate a presentation and report bounded structural and accessibility diagnostics.
Copy a verified revision after checking that the destination is absent or already identical.
